topics.name: Nvidia Stock
old_facts: Jensen Huang announced a new Blackwell chip.
Analysts predict high demand for AI GPUs.

new_articles.text: Nvidia stock rose 5% on Monday after Jensen Huang announced a new Blackwell chip. However, supply chain issues were reported today causing a distinct 2% drop in after-hours trading.

topics.name: Local Election
old_facts: Mayor Smith is running for re-election.
The polling stations opened at 7 AM.
Voter turnout is expected to be high.

new_articles.text: The polling stations opened at 7 AM and Mayor Smith is running for re-election. In a surprising turn, preliminary exit polls showing Smith trailing by 15 points were released just now.
